inputs.price_source: Yahoo Finance LII regular market price 2026-07-10
inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 free cash flow $638.8M (OCF $757.6M minus capex $118.8M) ÷ 35.4M diluted weighted-average shares (10-K filed 2026-02-17)
inputs.dividend_source: Cash dividends $4.55 per share in 2025; raised from $4.36 effective July 2025 (10-K)
inputs.normalization_note: Lawrence base uses FY2025 filed free cash flow. OCF fell to $757.6M from $945.7M in 2024 on working-capital timing; capex $118.8M. Q1 2026 diluted EPS $3.35 vs $3.63 prior year — not used as FCF starting point.

bear.notes: Residential HVAC volumes stay soft; Home Comfort profit flat; multiple compresses toward mid-cycle peers

base.notes: Building Climate price/mix offsets Home Comfort volume; buybacks ~2% annual; segment margins hold low-20s / mid-20s

bull.notes: Volume recovery in residential; BCS commercial/refrigeration mix lifts margin; $1B buyback authorization deployed

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Manufacturing PP&E and leases on balance sheet; no land/NAV misstatement (10-K FY2025)

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant royalty?
option_scan.evidence: Operating HVAC manufacturer; no resource royalty

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Home Comfort 21.8% margin; Building Climate 23.4% margin FY2025 (10-K segment note)

option_scan.question: Backlog / embedded product option in revenue path?
option_scan.evidence: Heat pumps, cold-chain refrigeration, connected controls in segment growth; Duro Dyne/Supco bolt-ons in BCS

option_scan.question: Product option already in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Electrification and efficiency product mix modeled via growth assumptions, not separate terminal

stance_proposal.rationale: Premium multiple (~31× FY2025 free cash flow) leaves base Lawrence IRR below 15% hurdle despite pricing power and buybacks

growth_explanation.mechanism: Price/mix and share repurchases compound per-share owner cash while residential volumes cycle; Building Climate commercial/refrigeration provides offset.
growth_explanation.base_growth_source: FY2025 segment profit +5% consolidated; BCS +9% profit; buybacks $482M
growth_explanation.bear_trigger: Prolonged Home Comfort volume decline without price offset
growth_explanation.bull_trigger: Residential replacement rebound plus BCS mix above 24% margin
